title: FriendActivity (R-I9 / R-L8) — an event by one of the learner's friends, surfaced in the owner's activity feed (load-only; produced by the friends engine).

actor_id.description: The acting friend's identity key (the engine's free-form id; currently the @handle). Stored as text.

type.description: FriendActivityType.name (stored as text; the engine maps an unknown value to a safe default for forward-compat).
